subcodes.first_line: O learned one! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that thou art in contact with the survivors of one who hath attained unto his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فاضل نامه شما رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که با بازماندگان من ادرک عند ربک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
